ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the design pattern */,
  "gof_category" TEXT /* Category of the design pattern (e.g., Creational, Structural, Behavioral) */,
  "problem_statement" TEXT /* Problem statement that the pattern addresses */,
  "pattern_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pattern and its implementation */,
  "example_code" TEXT /* Example code for the pattern */,
  "often_uses" TEXT /* Patterns that are often used in conjunction with this pattern */,
  "related_to" TEXT /* Patterns that are related to this pattern */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the pattern was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the pattern was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design pattern */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the pattern */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_versions_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., learner, content creator, moderator, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Expertise of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design pattern */,
  "last_viewed" TEXT /* Date the user last viewed the pattern */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the pattern has been completed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes on the pattern */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the pattern */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags assigned to the pattern by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progress_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the discussion */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design pattern the discussion is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the discussion */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion or comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the discussion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the discussion was last updated */,
  "parent_discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent discussion (for replies and comments) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the discussion (e.g., question, answer, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_parent_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussion_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discussion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who cast the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of the vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussion_votes_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pattern_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design pattern */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pattern_tags_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("pattern_id") REFERENCES patterns ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
